attacking_style: Does not typically animate races himself; prefers to position conservatively and wait for opportunities rather than initiating attacks, even when in contention for podium positions.
team_tactics: Conservative team tactics that prioritize positioning over aggressive racing. Limited evidence of team setting tempo or creating launching opportunities for Vanmarcke.
terrain_preference: Flemish monument terrain suits him well - consistently places in top-5 on cobbled climbs and pavé sectors. Strong enough to stay with leading groups but not explosive enough to create separation.
vulnerability: Susceptible to bad luck in critical moments (crashes on key climbs). Lacks animation and attacking impulse when positioned well, potentially missing podium opportunities through passivity.
key_patterns: Consistent top-5 finisher in Flemish monuments without animating the race (2 races)
Positioned well in chase groups on critical climbs but doesn't attack (2 races)
Conservative racing approach even when podium positions are realistic (2 races)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent top-5 placement suggests steady form in Flemish races, but lack of progression from chase to podium indicates plateau
